title: AN ACT TO AMEND SUB-ITEM (m), GROUP II, ITEM 27 FOR THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE, PARAGRAPH (a), TITLE C, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED TWENTY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 7124 / 53 OG No. 22, 8038 (November 30, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2005, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND SUB-ITEM (

m

), GROUP II, ITEM 27 FOR THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE, PARAGRAPH (

a

), TITLE C, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED TWENTY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Sub-item (

m

), Group II, item 27 for the Province of Leyte, paragraph (

a

), Title C, section one of Republic Act Numbered Nine hundred twenty is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(

m

) Burauen-Albuera road P 56,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
